verses.text: Tua ciangin amaute in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang hong tumpih uh a, David in ama-a' dingin a lamsak puanbuk sungah koih uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate Pasian' mai-ah pia uh hi
David in meihal biaknate leh thunuama a biaknate a piak a man khit ciangin amah in Topa' min tawh mite thupha pia a
Israel mi numei leh pasal khempeuhte tungah anlum khat, sa bak khat, leh leenggahkeu bek khat ciat a hawm hi
Tua thamloin amah in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah na semin thu a ngen ding, lungdamna a ko ding, leh Israel Pasian, Topa a phat dingin Levi mite pawlkhat a seh hi

Asaf a ukpi hi a, ama zomah Zekhariah ahi hi. Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obededom, leh Jeiel, harp lasaknate leh laia lasaknate a tum dingte ahi uh hi. Asaf in daltuahte a tum ding hi a
siampite Benaiah leh Jahaziel-te in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah peengkulte a tum paisuak ding uh ahi hi.
Tua ciangin tua ni-in David in Asaf leh a Levi mipihte in Topa tungah hih bangin lungdam kohna la a sa dingin a seh masa hi
Topa' tungah lungdamna ko-in, ama min lo un la, ama septe khempeuh mite' lakah kitheisak un
Amah la sak un. Phatna la amah sak un la, a lamdang a septe khempeuh mite tungah gen un
Ama min siangtho hangin nuamin diang un la, Topa a zong mite khempeuh lungdam ta uh hen
Topa leh ama hatna zong un la, ama ompihna zong den un
A lamdang a nasepte phawk un la, a lamdang ama genkhiat a thukhennate phawk un
no ama nasem Abraham' suante, Jakob' suante, ama teeltuamte aw
Amah, eite' Topa Pasian hi a, ama thupiaknate leitung khempeuh-a' ding ahi hi
Amah in a thuciamna phawk tawntung hi. Khang tul khata dingin a thupiakna kammal
Abraham tawh a thuciamna, Isaac tungah a khapna
Jakob tungah thu ciamin, amah in a kipsak, Israel tungah tawntung thuciamna-in a kipsak
“Nangma tungah Kanaan gam hong pia-in, gamhluahin na tanh dingin kong pia ding hi,” a cihte phawk tawntung hi
Amaute a mi-in tawmin, gentaak loin peemta hi uh a
minam khat pan nam khatah vak kawikawi-in, kumpi gam khat pan gamdang khatah a pai lai-un
amaute kuamah nengniamsak lo hi. Amaute' hangin amah in kumpite taigawp a
“Ka sathau nilhte lawng kei un la, ka kamsangte tungah siatna hih kei un!” ci hi
Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa la sak un! A ni ni-in ama hotkhiatna thu gengen un
Minam dangte lakah ama minthan'na genkhia un la, a lamdang ama septe mi khempeuh lakah gen un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian mahmah a, nakpi takin phat ding ahi hi; pasian khempeuh sangin lamdang sakzawk ding ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh minam dangte' pasian-te milim hi lel a, ahih hangin Topa ahih leh vantungte a bawlpa ahi hi
Pahtawina leh minliatna in amah umcih a, thahatna leh lungdamna in amah kimkot hi
Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa theitel un la, Topa' minthan'na leh a thahatna theitel un
Amah in a ngah ding a kilawm minthan'na Topa' tungah pia un. Biakna puak un la, ama mai-ah pai un! Biakna puan silhin Topa bia un
Leitung mi khempeuh aw, ama mai-ah ling un; hi hi, leitung kip mahmah a, kilok ngeilo ding hi
Vantung kipak hen la, leitung lungdam ta hen; minam khempeuhte lakah, “ Topa maang hi!” amaute in ci ta uh hen
Tuipi leh a sunga om khempeuh awng uh hen la, gamlak leh a sunga om khempeuh lungdamin diang ta uh hen
Tua ciangin gamlak singte in lungdamna tawh Topa' mai-ah la sa ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung thu khen dingin amah hong pai hi
Amah hoih ahih manin Topa' tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip a tawntungin a kho hi

“Kote hong khahkhia in, kote hong honkhia Pasian aw, minam dangte lak panin kote hong kaikhawm in. Na min siangtho tungah lungdam kong koh theihna ding uh leh, nangmah phatna-ah ka minthan'na dingun kote hong hon in
Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah ta hen, a tawntung pan a tawntung dongin!” zong ci lai un, a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, “Amen!” ci-in Topa a phat uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Thuciamna Singkuang-a' dingin Levi Mite Kiseh

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin David in nisima a kisam bangin Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah na a sem tawntung dingin Asaf leh a Levi mipihte Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah nusia a
Obededom leh a behte sawmguklegiatte zong a nusia hi. Jeduthun' tapa Obededom leh Hosah-te pen kongpi cing dingte ahi uh hi

Tua ciangin amah in Topa' thukham sungah a kigelh ama thupiak khempeuh bangin, zingsang leh nitakin meihal biakna tau tungah Topa-a' dingin meihal biaknate a pia tawntung dingin, Gibeon-a om mual dawna Topa' biakbuk mai-ah siampi Zadok leh a sanggam siampite a nusia hi
Tuate' banah amaute tawh Heman leh Jeduthun zong om a, ama itna kip kho tawntung ahih manin Topa' tungah lungdamna a ko dingin a kiteel, a minin a kilokhia midang omlai hi
Heman leh Jeduthun in la aw dingin peengkulte leh daltuahte nei uh a, biakna lasakna dingin lasakna nate nei uh hi. Jeduthun' tapate kulhkongpi cing dingin kiseh hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uhah ciah uh a, David zong a innkuante thupha a pia dingin a inn-ah a ciah hi.
